name: Chicken Parmesan
recipeIngredient: 1/2 of a 10-ounce package frozen spinach, drained and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl combine the Parmesan cheese pieces with the cheese mixture to coat.
2. In a small saucepan cook the chicken breasts in margarine over medium heat until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
3. Add milk and Italian seasoning to the saucepan; stir to coat the chicken.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer and reduce heat to low. Cook for 35 minutes or until tender.
5. Spoon the cheese mixture onto each chicken breast. Sprinkle with remaining Parmesan cheese.
Note: PER SERVING: 202 cal., 30g Pro., 4g Fat, 213mg Sodium, 361mg Potassium
